appliedItems.title: simple traditional fat
appliedItems.explanation: This gives butter a cleaner identity than heavily processed fat substitutes.

appliedItems.title: very strong culinary usefulness
appliedItems.explanation: Butter has real kitchen legitimacy and practical use that matters in this category.

appliedItems.title: can fit as a moderate traditional fat
appliedItems.explanation: The editorial position here is that butter belongs as a flawed but legitimate middle-ground fat rather than a bottom-tier industrial product.

ignoredItems.title: saturated fat is a major drawback
ignoredItems.explanation: This is the main reason butter cannot be an elite oils-and-fats food.

ignoredItems.title: cholesterol is high
ignoredItems.explanation: A second meaningful strike against the fat profile.

ignoredItems.title: fat profile is clearly weaker than top-tier oils
ignoredItems.explanation: Butter is not competing with the best oils on chemistry alone.
